azure_web_search: Search the web in real time via Azure OpenAI Responses API (requires Azure OpenAI credentials)
tavily_search: AI-optimized search engine returning curated results with summaries (free 1,000 calls/month)
tavily_extract: Extract clean text from URLs (strips ads and navigation); supports batch extraction
serper_search: Google Search via Serper.dev API with search/news/images/places modes (free 2,500 calls)
web_search: Search the web via DuckDuckGo + Wikipedia (free, no API key required)
get_datetime: Get the current date, time, and timezone information
url_fetch: Fetch and summarize the text content of a web page
json_parser: Parse a JSON string and extract specified fields
csv_log_analyzer: Read and merge all CSV files in a directory for AI log analysis (supports filename filter, row limit, recursive scan)
zip_extractor: Extract a ZIP file to a temp directory and return the file listing
write_file: Write text content to a file (.csv, .json, .txt, .md, .xml, .log, .yaml, .html, .tsv)
write_csv: Write a JSON array to a CSV file (auto-generates headers, RFC 4180 escaping)
send_email: Send an email via SMTP with optional attachments (requires SMTP credentials)
list_directory: List directory structure in tree format to explore file organization
read_file: Read a specific line range from a file (with line numbers)
search_code: Search code matching a regex pattern in the codebase (supports context lines, file filtering)
file_diff: Compare two files and show differences in unified diff format (supports ignoring whitespace)
text_diff: Compare two text strings and show differences in unified diff format (supports ignoring whitespace)
